title: CNBC's UK Exchange newsletter: Trump's $10 billion lawsuit is just one problem facing the BBC's new boss
summary_full: Former Google executive Matt Brittin's appointment comes as the BBC prepares to battle a $10 billion defamation claim from U.S. President Donald Trump.
